common.tenantText: Your platform is isolated under tenant workspace

auth.activationSuccessDesc: Welcome to HoaLang. Your account has been successfully verified. Redirecting you shortly.
auth.activationFailedDesc: Your verification link has expired or is invalid. Please register again to request a new link.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your registered email address to receive a password reset link.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccessDesc: We have sent a password recovery link to your email address. Please check your inbox to continue setting up a new password.
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Please enter your new password and confirm it below.
auth.resetPasswordSuccessDesc: Your password has been successfully updated. You will be automatically redirected to the Login page in 5 seconds.
auth.resetPasswordError: Password reset failed. The token may be expired or invalid.

hero.title: Touch the Essence
hero.subtitle: A journey through traditional craft villages — where the hands of artisans preserve the soul of a thousand-year-old culture.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Three steps to start your journey
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse over 120 traditional craft villages across 8 cultural regions of Vietnam on an intuitive map.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Artificial intelligence analyzes your preferences and timing, generating a unique itinerary for each journey.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Join hands-on workshops with local artisans and bring home authentic, meaningful handcrafted items.

quote.text: Each pottery vase is a poem about clay — the artisan works in silence yet with nimble hands, creating eternity from what was once merely earth.
quote.author: Nguyen Van Binh
quote.title: Meritorious Artisan — Bat Trang Pottery Village

cta.label: Personalized Journey
cta.title: Let AI Craft Your Itinerary
cta.desc: Enter your email to receive a personalized craft village exploration itinerary, custom-tailored for you by HoaLang AI.
cta.successDesc: Your itinerary is being prepared — please check your email.
cta.footer: No account required  •  100% Free  •  4 languages supported

footer.desc: A platform connecting travel and preserving the heritage values of Vietnamese traditional craft villages. A journey to cherish the soul of the nation.

dashboardPayment.title: Payment Settings
dashboardPayment.subtitle: Configure your own PayOS account to receive money directly
dashboardPayment.guideStep2: Go to PayOS Dashboard → Integration Info
dashboardPayment.guideStep3: Copy the three keys: Client ID, API Key, Checksum Key and paste them into the form below.
dashboardPayment.statusNotConnected: Payment not configured — Customers can only checkout with COD
dashboardPayment.webhookHelp: Copy and fill this Webhook URL into your PayOS Dashboard so that the system automatically updates order status when customers pay successfully.
dashboardPayment.errorSave: Connection failed. Please verify your API keys.

checkout.payCodDesc: Direct cash payment to the artisan upon arrival or delivery.
checkout.payPayosDesc: Scan VietQR code for safe and immediate transfer directly into the craft village's account.
checkout.payPayosDisabledDesc: Online payment is not configured yet. Please select COD instead.
checkout.payPayosTooltip: This craft village has not integrated their PayOS gateway yet.
checkout.successSub: 🎉 Thank you for supporting traditional Vietnamese heritage!
checkout.instructionsDesc: Your order has been recorded successfully. Please prepare the exact cash amount to pay directly to the master artisan upon delivery or arrival.
checkout.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
checkout.errorDatabase: Matching database item not found. Please run backend seeder.
checkout.errorTxDesc: An error occurred while processing your checkout request.

villagesList.title: Heritage Journey
villagesList.subtitle: Discover the exquisite traditional craft villages across Vietnam, where the nation's artistic soul is preserved.
villagesList.noResults: No craft villages found matching your filter criteria.

shopList.title: Heritage Boutiques
shopList.subtitle: Trade directly with Vietnam's leading traditional artisan studios. Supporting local communities.
shopList.noResults: No boutiques found matching your search.

profile.title: Heritage Profile
profile.subtitle: View your heritage account details and manage collaboration activities with master artisans.
profile.phoneError: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits.
profile.nameError: Full name must be at least 2 characters.
profile.ordersSubtitle: Review your journey supporting craft heritage through purchased items and registered workshops.
profile.emptyOrders: You have not made any transactions yet.

vouchers.title: Heritage Vouchers
vouchers.subtitle: Discover and apply promotion campaigns in support of master artisans.

payment.successSubtitle: Thank you for supporting Vietnamese craft heritage!
payment.cancelSubtitle: The online payment transaction has been cancelled by the user.
